about.heroSubtitle: Mindmap Ziin launches a ready canvas, keeps every edit in Git, and lets you share when you’re ready—so the work feels light.
about.sectionHighlightsSubtitle: Mindmap Ziin removes the chores that normally slow down mind mapping, so you can start capturing ideas immediately.
about.highlightQuickStartCopy: Open the editor and the canvas is pre-focused with a centered root node, ideal zoom, and quick access to shortcuts.
about.highlightAutoSaveCopy: Each map lives in its own Git branch so nothing is lost and every iteration can be restored.
about.highlightKeyboardCopy: Enter to edit, Tab for children, M for menu, arrows for navigation—no hunting for buttons.
about.highlightShareCopy: Flip a share badge, preview read-only mode, or stay private in guest mode until you decide.
about.sectionComfortSubtitle: Comfort features stack up so sessions feel smooth whether you’re brainstorming solo or presenting to a team.
about.comfortNoSetupCopy: Mindmap Ziin handles the boring setup details for every new map.
about.comfortNoSetupBullet1: Auto root node, canvas size, and zoom fit
about.comfortNoSetupBullet2: First save fires automatically with retry
about.comfortNoSetupBullet3: Guest mode keeps files local until you share
about.comfortFlowCopy: Navigation, menus, and edits live right on the keyboard.
about.comfortFlowBullet2: “m” opens the context menu near your node
about.comfortFlowBullet3: Arrow keys walk connected nodes or edges
about.comfortMediaCopy: Images and PDFs behave like first-class citizens.
about.comfortMediaBullet1: Paste images—upload + sizing happens for you
about.comfortMediaBullet2: PDF nodes have a built-in viewer modal
about.comfortMediaBullet3: Retries and caching keep embeds visible
about.workflowCreateCopy: Start from the dashboard or editor with everything prepped so your first keystroke lands in the root node.
about.workflowCollaborateCopy: Style edges, drop in media, and fine-tune anchors without leaving the canvas.
about.workflowShareCopy: Save to Git, copy a share badge, or export snapshots with confidence.
about.sectionCommunityCopy: Mindmap Ziin is community-driven. Read the docs, file an issue, or submit a pull request—everyone is welcome.

share.adNotice: Clicking on Google ads helps support the site!
share.adBanner: This service is supported by ads revenue. Your ad clicks help keep this service free for everyone 🙏
